channel.title: Gustavo A. Araújo R.
channel.description: PhD researcher in structural and earthquake engineering at Stanford University. Nonlinear finite-element analysis, OpenSees, GPU computing, and mass timber systems.

item.title: Welcome to the Site
item.dc:creator: Gustavo A. Araújo R.
item.description:
Welcome! This site replaces my earlier personal page and hosts:

  • Research updates on nonlinear FE analysis, earthquake engineering, and mass timber systems
  • OpenSeesPy examples and GPU/CUDA workflow notes
  • Project summaries and links to code on GitHub

What to expect

Short posts on reproducible analysis workflows, lessons learned from OpenSees model development, and notes from conferences such as the NHERI SimCenter Computational Symposium.

Stay connected

  • Publications
  • Google Scholar
  • Contact

Thanks for visiting!
